restaurant.name: Haji Sahab Biryani
restaurant.tagline: Ek Baar Khao, Baar Baar Aao
restaurant.taglineEn: Taste It Once, Crave It Forever
restaurant.description: Lahore ki sabse mashoor biryani — since 1989. Haji Sahab ne ek karahi se shuru kiya, aaj poora shehar jaanta hai.
restaurant.descriptionEn: Lahore's most beloved biryani house — since 1989. What started with one pot and a street corner has become a legend.
restaurant.address: Near Masjid Chowk, Cavalry Ground, Lahore
restaurant.deliveryNote: Home delivery available via WhatsApp order

carouselSlides.heading: Biryani Jaise Pehle Hoti Thi
carouselSlides.headingEn: Biryani the Way It Used to Be
carouselSlides.subheading: Dum pukht, original masala, 35 saal ka tajruba

introContent.heading: Haji Sahab Ki Biryani
introContent.body: In 1989, Haji Muhammad Yusuf set up a single pot on a street corner in Cavalry Ground. He had one recipe, passed down from his father, and a belief that good food needs no advertisement. Word spread. The line grew. The pot got bigger. The recipe never changed.
introContent.bodyUrdu: 1989 mein, Haji Sahab ne ek degi aur ek chaabi se shuru kiya. Aaj unka biryani poore Lahore mein mashhoor hai. Recipe wohi hai.

featuredItems.name: Dum Biryani
featuredItems.description: Slow-cooked on dum with original 1989 masala. Half plate or full.

featuredItems.name: Karahi Gosht
featuredItems.description: Fresh mutton, iron tawa, pure desi ghee. No shortcuts.

featuredItems.name: Raita & Salad
featuredItems.description: House-made dahi raita with boondi. The biryani is incomplete without it.

whyUsPoints.title: Original Masala
whyUsPoints.text: Same recipe since 1989. Not a single ingredient changed.

whyUsPoints.title: Fresh Meat Daily
whyUsPoints.text: Gosht aata hai subah, bikta hai shaam tak. Koi leftover nahi.

whyUsPoints.title: Cooked on Wood Fire
whyUsPoints.text: Gas nahi, lakdi ki aag pe pakti hai biryani. Wohi khusbhu hai.

whyUsPoints.title: Family Business
whyUsPoints.text: Teen naslein is degi ki daikha bhal kar rahi hain.

about.heading: 35 Saal, Ek Recipe

story.text: Haji Muhammad Yusuf started with a single degi on a street corner in Cavalry Ground. One masala, one dream.
Word spread through the neighbourhood. The line grew so long he had to hire his first helper — his nephew, Tariq.
The family opened a proper seating area. People finally had a table. The recipe, as always, stayed the same.
Haji Sahab's sons took over operations. The old man still checks the masala every morning.
Third generation. Still the same recipe. Still the same wood fire. Still the same long line.

about.founderQuote: Khaana sachcha ho toh advertisement ki zaroorat nahi. Log khud batate hain.
about.founderQuoteEn: If the food is honest, it needs no advertisement. People tell each other.

reviews.heading: Log Kya Kehte Hain
reviews.subheading: Hamare grahak hi hamare brand ambassador hain

items.name: Asad Mehmood
items.text: I moved across the city but still come here for Friday biryani. Nothing beats the original taste. The dum is perfect.

items.name: Sadia Rahman
items.text: The Karahi here reminds me of my grandmother's cooking. Cooked in pure desi ghee with a smoky flavor from the tawa. Highly recommended.

items.name: Bilal Chaudhry
items.text: If you are truly a biryani lover, this is your pilgrimage. The special biryani with extra mutton is out of this world.

contact.heading: Aayein Ya Order Karein
contact.subheading: WhatsApp pe message karein, hum bata dein ge
contact.orderNote: For bulk orders (dawat/catering), call or WhatsApp at least 1 day in advance.

faqs.a: Haan, WhatsApp pe order karein aur apna address bhejein. Nearby areas mein delivery available hai.

faqs.q: Dawat ke liye order kar sakte hain?
faqs.a: Bilkul — dawat, parties aur office ke liye bulk orders available hain. Ek din pehle bata dein.

faqs.q: Biryani kab tak available hoti hai?
faqs.a: Biryani dopahar 12 baje se shuru hoti hai aur raat tak — jab tak stock hai. Juma ko 1 baje ready.
Haan, parcel always available hai. Call karein ya seedha aa jayein.
